examples: Then one of them had the brilliant idea of imitating Philip's clumsy run.
The leg action of the breaststroke may have originated by imitating the swimming action of frogs.
It is likely that intolerant folks grew up imitating intolerant parents and the cycle of prejudice has simply continued for generations.
Imitating certain accents gives the perception that someone is simply being racist, he says.
The idea of imitating France, with its budget deficits and sickly manufacturing sector, seems bizarre.
